exemplars.text: Hello!
Thanks, that worked.
What is the capital of France?
Translate 'good morning' to Spanish.
List the main characters in this paragraph.
Summarize this article in three bullet points.
Extract all email addresses from the text below.
Rewrite this sentence to be more concise.
Add a docstring to this Python function.
Implement a function that reverses a linked list.
Refactor this module to use dependency injection.
Review this pull request for security issues.
Explain step by step how a binary search tree insertion works.
Debug why this async handler intermittently drops messages.
Find the race condition in these three functions.
Trace through this stack trace and identify the root cause.
Design a migration plan from monolith to microservices with trade-offs.
Compare OAuth2 authorization code and client credentials flows, then recommend one.
Prove that the greedy algorithm achieves the optimal solution for this problem.
Research competing approaches, evaluate them systematically, and propose an architecture.
